title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 25–28, this part focuses on Unknown person #19, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #21 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me...! that it might be that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and after I just gave you such a lovely makeover...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If your idea of cuteness involves not fighting back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Then being cute can stuff it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I'll throw you off your guard!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
